title: Turkey's World Cup meltdown is a milestone in unraveling of Erdogan's reign, says Selim Koru
gist: Analyst Selim Koru argues Turkey's World Cup loss is emblematic of the failure of Erdogan's 'civilizational project' and may prove a milestone in the unraveling of his 24-year reign.

insights.claim: Analyst Selim Koru argues Turkey's World Cup loss is emblematic of the failure of President Erdogan's 'civilizational project.'
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: A credibility crack in Erdogan's ideological project foreshadows political-transition risk for Turkish assets.
insights.locator: Selim Koru, founder of the Kulturkampf Substack

insights.claim: Koru contends the World Cup meltdown may prove to be a milestone in the unraveling of Erdogan's 24-year reign.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Watch Turkish political succession dynamics as a driver of lira and policy volatility.
insights.locator: Selim Koru, founder of the Kulturkampf Substack
